caption: In a rural, wooded setting with a building in the background, several individuals in military camouflage clothing are present. In the initial frames, the scene shows a wide view of a dirt area with debris and a person walking away from the camera, followed by a closer view of a person's arm and hand reaching toward another person. The later frames focus on a soldier wearing a tactical vest and a cap, with a white band around his left arm. Other soldiers in camouflage stand nearby in the greenery. A rifle is visible leaning against or held by a soldier in the background. The text "Hero Ukraine" is overlaid on the scene, and a red and white circular logo containing the number "13" appears in the upper right of the frames. The sequence transitions from a wide shot of the environment to a close-up of the individuals.
